alias_boundary: Aliases are natural-language triggers only; only reviewwrite is a technical Skill ID and slash invocation.
maintainer: 中财数碳（北京）科技有限公司与中央财经大学人工智能与数字财经研究中心（CUFE/AIDF）

language_support.planned: Additional languages require a reviewed language pack, locale-aware few-shots, regressions, and professional native-language review.

office_qa.default_behavior: read-only structural audit; no automatic font replacement
office_qa.render_gate: host-dependent; rendered previews require page-by-page human inspection
office_qa.profile_requirement: template or confirmed JSON font profile is required before any future repair workflow

claude-code.note: Use the current host discovery and installation mechanism; do not infer a path from another client.

hermes-agent.note: Use the active profile's native discovery and refresh mechanism.

gemini-cli.note: Use Gemini's current native skills discovery and reload capability; do not infer a directory from another client.

github-copilot.note: Use the host integration's current Agent Skills discovery and installation mechanism.

openclaw.invocation: natural-language or configured agent skill selection
openclaw.note: Prefer the host's native skill installation and verification flow for the active workspace or managed scope.

workbuddy.invocation: /reviewwrite or skill selector；自然语言：审写 / ReviewWrite
workbuddy.note: Use the host UI or native skill channel, then verify the skill is visible and loadable.

generic.note: Requires an Agent Skills compatible loader that reads SKILL.md plus relative references and scripts.
